MicroStrategy Becomes Strategy, Invests $20B in Bitcoin Amid Rebrand
articles.description: MicroStrategy rebrands to Strategy, adds the Bitcoin symbol to its logo, and invests $20B in BTC, aiming for a $10B annual gain despite revenue decline.

articles.title: Cboe Seeks SEC Approval for Ethereum ETF Options Amid Rising Demand
articles.description: Coinspeaker Cboe Exchange Seeks SEC Approval for Ethereum ETF Options Trading The Cboe BZX Exchange proposes Rule 19.3 amendment to list Ethereum ETF options, as spot ETF trading volume hits record $1.5B amid growing institutional demand.
